name: Lifezone Metals Ltd
description: Lifezone Metals (NYSE: LZM) is a modern metals company dedicated to delivering cleaner and more responsible metals production and recycling. By leveraging its proprietary Hydromet Technology, the company aims to provide a sustainable supply chain solution for the global battery metals market. Lifezone focuses on reducing energy consumption, lowering emissions, and decreasing production costs compared to traditional smelting methods. Its flagship project, the Kabanga Nickel Project in Tanzania, serves as a cornerstone of its commitment to providing high-quality, responsibly sourced metals essential for the global energy transition.
